settings.text: From a simple photo to a one-of-a-kind, made-to-order gift they will treasure.

settings.label: Hurry up! Only [qty] items left in stock

settings.heading: Item details
settings.content:
Capture your furry friend's unique personality in a vibrant, custom photo tropical style cat Hawaii Shirt! Perfect for the cat lover in your life, it also makes a memorable summer or beach trip gift!

Product details:

  • Fabric: 100% polyester
  • Regular fit
  • Short sleeve, lapel collar, button closure
  • Fabric weight: 120g/m²
  • Care: machine wash cold, do not bleach, tumble dry low
  • Made on demand — no minimum order quantity

Processing time: 3–5 business days
Shipping time: 10–15 business days

settings.heading: Shipping Info
settings.content:
• The above time frame is only applied for orders to the US with standard shipping methods.
  • International orders: it may take 2–5 days longer due to the customs clearance process.
  • Orders can be cancelled or modified only within 2 hours after being placed.
  • All products are made to order.

settings.heading: Satisfaction Guarantee
settings.content:
• Full refund or replacement (no extra fee, within 30 days of purchase) for faulty, defective or damaged products.
  • Full refund if the item is not as described.
  • We have 24/7/365 ticket and email support.

settings.heading: Hot Deals
settings.content:
Get ready for a shopping experience like no other! Explore our latest collection tailored for dog and cat lovers, camping enthusiasts, and families alike.

Enjoy an exclusive 10% discount using code HOT10, combinable with other codes.

settings.author: Sophie M.
settings.title: The perfect gift
settings.content: I ordered this for my mom's birthday with our family photo and she cried when she opened it. The print is crisp and the colors are so vibrant. Absolutely worth every penny.

settings.author: James T.
settings.title: Better than expected
settings.content: Was a bit nervous ordering a personalized item online but this completely blew me away. The quality is top notch and it arrived faster than the estimated date.

settings.author: Emma R.
settings.title: Absolutely love it
settings.content: The photo came out so clear and the material feels premium. I have already gotten so many compliments. Will definitely order again!

settings.author: Michael B.
settings.title: Great product, worth the wait
settings.content: Really happy with the result. It took a couple of extra days to arrive but the quality made it worth the wait. Would order again.

settings.author: Olivia W.
settings.title: Made my day
settings.content: Customer service helped me adjust my photo and the final product is gorgeous. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a meaningful, personal gift.

settings.author: Daniel K.
settings.title: Exceptional quality
settings.content: Exactly as pictured and beautifully made. You can tell it is a quality item the moment you hold it. Very impressed.

settings.author: Charlotte P.
settings.title: Will buy again
settings.content: This is my second time ordering and the quality is consistent every single time. The personalization makes it feel so special.

settings.author: David E.
settings.title: Shocking quality
settings.content: It is rare to find a company that delivers exactly what you ordered. It arrived in a timely manner and was exactly as pictured.

settings.author: Liz C.
settings.title: Amazing
settings.content: This exceeded all my expectations! Good quality, fits well and the print is better than I expected.

settings.author: Noah G.
settings.title: Incredible attention to detail
settings.content: The finish is flawless and the photo reproduction is stunning. Packaging was premium too. This is how you do personalized products.

settings.author: Ava L.
settings.title: My favorite purchase
settings.content: I cannot stop looking at it. Such a thoughtful, high-quality keepsake. Shipping was quick and everything was perfect.

settings.author: V. Arnold
settings.title: Love it
settings.content: Wonderful. My only suggestion is to order your normal size. Beautiful work and a lovely keepsake.
